items.title: CSV upload fails for large customer import
items.body: Same failure observed by Acme and Northstar. P1 incident with one business day SLA remaining.

execution.definitionOfDone: Incident resolved or workaround confirmed with customer success.

items.title: Dashboard count mismatch after nightly job
items.body: P2 data freshness concern. Manager asked for root cause by Monday.

execution.definitionOfDone: Mismatch root cause documented and replay/fix plan agreed with data team.
process: Compare dashboard query to warehouse table
